title: Map of entire Monday.com account
excerpt: Is it possible to create a map of the entire Monday.com account? To show all automation and integrations and how everything is connected. For visualizing third-party app can be involved, but how to extort all data in a w…

posts.author: valeriasem (Valeria)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it possible to create a map of the entire Monday.com account? To show all automation and integrations and how everything is connected. For visualizing third-party app can be involved, but how to extort all data in a way that it can be done easily?

posts.author: eClaireS (Claire Sowden)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @valeriasem - did you find a solution for this?

I need to do an account handover and this would be very useful

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi@valeriasem,
it is not possible to create a comprehensive map of an entire Monday.com account, including all automations, integrations, and their connections, directly within the Monday.com platform.
Monday.com primarily focuses on task and project management rather than providing advanced visualization tools for the entire account structure.

If you need any implementation support kindly contact us:

MSquare Support
Visit us here
Youtube Channel

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @eClaireS !

If you are on the Enterprise plan, there is a Content Directory available.

image330×821 24.1 KB

Regarding automations, a new feature called Workflow Management is gradually being released, and should be what you are looking for.

image932×636 56.9 KB

Hope this helps!

Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com
